decisions.D-01_ff: PCFF EMC auto-routed; PHAL false-flag overridden to PVNL
decisions.D-02_charges: embedded bond-increment PCFF class-II no QM
decisions.D-05_convergence: PASS rho=1.344 gcc -2.6pct; density/energy/spatial gates met; Ct advisory glassy
decisions.D-06_tg_fit_quality: Per-rate fits ALL GOOD non-degenerate revision fixed PVC2 degeneracy: r25=310.6 r50=267.6 r100=284.0 K. Multirate slope-gate FAIL slope -19.2 R2=0.376 span 0.6dec to single-rate fallback Tg=310.6 K -12.3pct vs exp PCFF underpredicts. K=2.80 GPa B0prime=9.53 fixed from PVC2 16.3.

tg.exp_basis: PVC Tg 354 K (81 C) +/-5%; honest band (NOT the tight [345,360]/[334,374] variants).
tg.tg_note: 3 rates [25,50,100]->[310.6,267.6,284.0] scattered, multirate r2=0.38 slope-fail. UNRELIABLE (was mislabeled rate_extrapolated). PVC MD Tg from these runs is fit-limited and scattered (308-348 K), straddling exp 354 K from below; multirate fits are POOR/inverted (slope-fail). Tg is NOT a validated property for PVC -- treat as unreliable, density is the validated headline. (No physical FF-underestimate claim: below-exp glassy Tg despite fast cooling is fit pathology, not a real offset.)

density.exp_basis: amorphous PVC 1.385 g/cm3 +/-5% (polymer_rules PVNL density is null).
density.density_note: HEADLINE PASS x4 (PVC's only validated property). PCFF ~2.5-3% low -- inside band but on the low side.

bulk_modulus.method_note: glassy hierarchy: Murnaghan WIDE [-1000,0,1500,3000,5000], B0'=9.53, r2=0.999 VALID primary. FAIL low. PVC2/3/4 cluster 2.7-2.9 GPa vs exp [3.5,4.5] = robust ~20-35% PCFF underestimate (consistent across methods+replicates; caveat: PCFF/PPPM virial). PVC1 has no valid K.

convergence.verdict: PASS rho=1.344 gcc -2.6pct; density/energy/spatial gates met; Ct advisory glassy

provenance.review_note: PVC replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: consistent bands; density headline PASS (low); Tg unreliable (scattered/inverted fits); K robust ~20-35% PCFF underestimate; PVC1 no valid K. Weakest validation set -- only density passes, and it passes low.
